haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL: Deliverable violates core task requirements. Script itself uses `set -euo pipefail`, proper error handling, pinned actions (✓), but solution is ~30% complete. Missing entirely: bats-core test files, test fixture files (tests/fixtures/*.conf, *.txt), bats installation in workflow, test execution step (workflow has no `bats tests/` invocation), act-result.txt artifact generation (required per spec), YAML structure validation, and actionlint pass verification. Workflow references nonexist

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. The workflow correctly handles multiline outputs, permissions, and dependencies. The Bash script features a clever and robust glob-to-regex translation, strict error handling, and solid variable scoping.
